text:
An example, under <https://www.freebsd.org/internal/developer/#_freebsd_porters_handbook>: 

> Table of __FreeBSD_version Values

The underscores can become completely invisible (obscured by underlining). For me, worse in www/chromium than in www/firefox. 

I'll attach a screenshot of Chromium.
